description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical red plastic bucket with a slightly flared rim and a black plastic bail handle attached to metal brackets on opposite sides. The surface of the bucket is matte with visible scuff marks and scratches, indicating frequent use. The interior appears hollow and clean, suitable for carrying liquids or loose materials. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping and lifting. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on the exterior. The bucket's utilitarian design suggests it is intended for general-purpose use in urban environments such as cleaning, gardening, or construction.
description: A red plastic bucket with a black bail handle, matte finish, and visible wear marks, designed for general utility use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top and smooth, unmarked red exterior with no handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the black plastic bail handle attached to a metal bracket on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle fully upright, spanning both sides of the bucket.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle angled down to the left, showing the attachment bracket.
